/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/astfort.dir/cmd/main.c.o CMakeFiles/astfort.dir/lib/mo/mo.c.o CMakeFiles/astfort.dir/lib/mm/mm.c.o CMakeFiles/astfort.dir/domain/edge/mcu/peripherals/tmp/tmp.c.o CMakeFiles/astfort.dir/domain/edge/mcu/peripherals/nvm/nvm_sim.c.o -o astfort
